"'''''Alien Anthology'' Addendum'''" was a article describing several species for use in the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] published in [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]]. It was an addendum to the [[Alien Anthology]] Sourcebook.

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
